summary: Iteration 5: Verified all 3 fixes from agent_to_agent_context. Backend: 13/13 tests passed including EPG batch endpoint, health check, route ordering. Frontend: Login screen fully functional with all UI elements present. EPG timestamp parsing confirmed working with real credentials returning start_timestamp as Unix epoch.

react_native_issues.issue: TouchableWithoutFeedback is deprecated, should use Pressable. Minor console warning only.

critical_code_review_comments: EPG timestamp parsing correctly uses start_timestamp/stop_timestamp with fallback to Date parsing - VERIFIED in live.tsx lines 67-68 and player.tsx lines 126-128
Backend route ordering correct: /epg/batch (line 180) defined BEFORE /epg/{stream_id} (line 195) - VERIFIED
Player screen landscape lock with expo-screen-orientation on mount/unmount - VERIFIED in player.tsx lines 62-71 (Platform.OS !== 'web' guard correct)
Web player height capped at 240px: PLAYER_HEIGHT = Platform.OS === 'web' ? 240 : ... - VERIFIED in live.tsx line 16
EPG batch returns dict keyed by stream_id with epg_listings array - with real creds stream 400 returns 4 listings
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 fixes from iteration 5 verified. EPG batch endpoint works without 503 errors (sequential 150ms delay between calls). Route /epg/batch correctly matches before /epg/{stream_id}. Real credential test: stream_ids=400,401,402 returns {'400': {epg_listings: [4 items]}, '401': {epg_listings: []}, '402': {epg_listings: []}}. start_timestamp=1771952400 is valid Unix epoch. Login screen has testIDs: login-logo, login-username-input, login-password-input, toggle-password-btn, login-submit-btn, login-error-text. Credentials from previous tests: USERNAME=DJBIGANT, PASSWORD=sTtb4D5v7T.

epg_verification.response_structure: Dict keyed by stream_id string. Each value has epg_listings array.
epg_verification.timestamp_format: start_timestamp=1771952400 (Unix epoch), title decoded from base64 'Truck U'
epg_verification.no_503_errors: Sequential 150ms delays between Xtream API calls prevents rate limiting
epg_verification.route_ordering: /epg/batch returns 200, not 422 (which would indicate route collision with {stream_id} param)
